product_updates.title: Anthropic took down thousands of GitHub repos trying to yank its leaked source code — a move the company says was an accident
product_updates.content: Anthropic executives said it was an accident and retracted the bulk of the takedown notices.

product_updates.title: Meta’s natural gas binge could power South Dakota
product_updates.content: Meta's upcoming Hyperion AI data center will be powered by 10 new natural gas plants.

product_updates.title: Cognichip wants AI to design the chips that power AI, and just raised $60M to try
product_updates.content: The firm says it can reduce the cost of chip development by more than 75% and cut the timeline by more than half.

product_updates.title: Less than a month: StrictlyVC San Francisco brings leaders from TDK Ventures, Replit, and more together
product_updates.content: StrictlyVC San Francisco brings leaders from TDK Ventures, Replit, and more together on April 30. Space is limited. Register here for your pass.

product_updates.title: Mercor says it was hit by cyberattack tied to compromise of open source LiteLLM project
product_updates.content: The AI recruiting startup confirmed a security incident after an extortion hacking crew took credit for stealing data from the company's systems.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: gig workers training humanoids, and better AI benchmarks
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. technical_breakthroughs.title: The gig workers who are training humanoid robots at home
technical_breakthroughs.content: When Zeus, a medical student living in a hilltop city in central Nigeria, returns to his studio apartment from a long day at the hospital, he turns on his ring light, straps his iPhone to his forehead, and starts recording himself. He raises his hands in front of him like a sleepwalker and puts a…
